allow: PowerShell(Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData\\ComposerSetup\\bin\\composer.bat" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Composer\\vendor\\bin\\composer" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\composer\\composer.phar" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe php 2>$null; where.exe composer 2>$null)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "php|herd|laravel" } | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "php|laragon|laravel" } | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "php|laragon" } | Select-Object FullName)
